overview: The Firm treats erectile dysfunction, Peyronie's disease, and premature ejaculation using non-invasive shockwave therapy. The clinic offers personalized treatment plans with 10-15 minute sessions and results typically within 3-6 weeks.
highlights: Non-invasive shockwave therapy (no pills, needles, or surgery)
Free consultation, assessment, and ultrasound blood flow check
Zero downtime with no reported side effects
targetAudience: Men with erectile dysfunction, Peyronie's disease, or premature ejaculation.
